driver_subject: media: cec: meson: drop of_match_ptr for ID table
kernel_subject: of/device: Don't NULLify match table in of_match_device() with CONFIG_OF=n
stage1_reason: Removal of of_match_ptr macro wrapper for of_match_table in platform_driver structure, indicating adaptation to kernel API changes regarding device tree matching
stage2_reason: Driver commit removes of_match_ptr wrapper, which became unnecessary after kernel commit c52eef0b6ee1 stopped NULLifying match table in of_match_device() when CONFIG_OF=n
